description: Create two linked Classic Dashboards (SimpleXML) in Splunk (http://localhost:8000, admin/SplunkAdmin1!) to facilitate IP investigations. The summary dashboard, named 'Global_Threat_Overview', must feature a table panel aggregating top source IPs from the 'security_logs' index. The detailed dashboard, named 'Detailed_IP_Investigation', must include a text input using the token 'target_ip' and at least one panel filtering 'security_logs' by that token. Configure the table in 'Global_Threat_Overview' with a drilldown that navigates to 'Detailed_IP_Investigation' and passes the clicked IP address to the 'form.target_ip' parameter.
